title: Formatting, Style, and Editor Consistency · Gate Lens: Formatter Choice
summary: Create one fast deterministic formatting path for code and configuration. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates formatter choice increment in a zero-diff formatting gate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose a deterministic formatter and define supported file scope.
Test setup, build, and checks from a clean environment.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
